blended.narrative: Edelweiss Valley is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,639 ft. Looking ahead, 21 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 7" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
